A suspenseful, intense psychological thriller. A man seeking his missing brother is thrust into a dark underworld that threatens his family and sanity.

A dark and twisty psychological thriller. A woman in an abusive relationship reaches out to her estranged friend with an unexpected, life-altering proposition.
A gripping survival thriller with religious elements. A group of plane crash survivors find themselves stranded and must fight for their survival.
Anthony Hopkins is diabolical in this intense and twisted thriller about a thief who breaks into the wrong luxury SUV. He finds himself trapped and fighting for survival.
The fourth instalment of the much-loved animated franchise. Gru, Lucy, Margo, Edith and Agnes welcome a new member to the family, Gru Jr., who is intent on tormenting his dad.
Jenna Ortega stars in this heartfelt romantic film. A chance meeting between two very different teenagers changes their lives forever.
Terror meets its match in Rebel Wilson in this chaotic action comedy. When a mercenary team hijacks a wedding, a secret agent bridesmaid fights to save the day.
Liam Neeson takes on a slapstick comedy role in this reboot of the 1980s classic. After following in his father's footsteps, Frank Drebin Jr must prevent the closure of Police Squad.
Oscar winner Tilda Swinton stars in this quirky comedy. A struggling toy designer from El Salvador becomes an assistant to an erratic art-world outcast to stay in the US.
Comedian Caleb Hearon dissects life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house at Chicago's Constellation.

A dark vampire horror comedy based on Matt Haig's novel. An ordinary family concealing a dark secret - they are vampires - has their secret uncovered, turning their lives upside down.
Halle Berry drives this mysterious horror. After an evil seems to have taken over the world, a family's only protection is their house and protective bond.
It's a chaotic comedy of errors in this British crime comedy. Two hapless friends run into trouble after an attempted bank robbery goes wrong.
A faith-based biopic about Duck Dynasty star Phil Robertson. Long before fame, Phil falls in love and starts a family, but his demons threaten to tear their lives apart.
This enthralling HBO documentary explores one of the world's greatest modern mysteries. Cullen Hoback investigates the origins of Bitcoin and its anonymous creator, Satoshi Nakamoto.
Shakespeare's classic tale of forbidden love is rendered into a lively and vibrant pop musical.
A terrifying deep-water thriller. Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck by a rock, leaving her trapped 28 meters below, fighting for her life.
Tom Hiddleston headlines this life-affirming epic fantasy. The life of Charles Krantz unfolds across three stunning chapters, filled with mystery, celebration, and fantasy.
The Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat is about to have a wild outdoor adventure! An unexpected reunion with his long-lost father - scruffy street cat Vic.
The spy escapades of Ethan Hunt and the IMF come to an end. They must stop a rogue AI called 'The Entity' before it destroys the world.
Scarlett Johansson leads a starry cast in this high-stakes seventh instalment. A team of skilled operatives seeks to extract dinosaur DNA for a medical breakthrough.
Maggie Q drives this action thriller. An Iraqi war veteran prepares to strike back after a group of home invaders attack during her sister's bachelorette party.
This biopic imagines Emily Brontë's story, which inspired her book Wuthering Heights. While navigating the struggles of family life, she yearns for artistic and personal freedom.

An action-packed Vietnam War thriller. A small outpost gets ambushed during the war, prompting a US Army squad to take the battle below ground on a high-stakes mission.
In this military action, Megan Fox takes up arms to fight for survival as she leads a band of mercenaries on a risky mission to rescue abducted girls in Africa.
Based on the true story of a family's journey from Down Under to centre stage. A mother's faith stands against all odds and inspires her husband and children to hold on to theirs.
A canine space adventure. Two children and their parents help a trio of aliens who are transformed into friendly dogs to escape the clutches of a UFO hunter.
The late Oscar-winning director William Friedkin adapts Herman Wouk's Pulitzer Prize-winning novel. A young lieutenant is accused of mutiny against his captain.
A satirical comedy. A man is recruited by a secret magical society of black people. Their important cause? Making white people's lives easier.
Zachary Levi stars in this heartfelt, inspiring film based on a real-life story of a family's struggles and triumphs as they care for their autistic son with brittle bone disease.
A beautifully animated Oscar-nominated adventure for adults and kids. This time, Hiccup and his dragon Toothless discover a hidden ice cave that's home to hundreds of new dragons.
Wrestler-turned-actor John Cena stars in this funny family comedy. When an elite firefighter team rescues three siblings, they face a task that they are not ready for: babysitting.
Tim Robinson and Paul Rudd lead this dark comedy about an awkward man trying to be friends with his charismatic neighbour. When the neighbour ends the friendship, he spirals out of control.
Scott Eastwood and Jamie Foxx face off in this star-studded action thriller. A former disciple wages a desperate battle to stop a cult leader whose rising movement endangers the force.
This compelling and star-studded film, inspired by a photo book by Danny Lyon, follows the rise and transformation of a Chicago-based biker gang into a dangerous gang in the 1960s.

An intense action thriller. A young woman is swept off her feet by a mysterious stranger who promises her a romantic boat trip. What follows is deceit, mistrust and violence.

This disaster thriller puts you right in the eye of the storm as a tornado rips through a town, forcing people to seek shelter in 13 minutes. Four families must unite in the aftermath.
Retroactively dubbed 'Yacht Rock', this documentary chronicles the world of soft rock in the late 1970s and early 1980s.
After an acclaimed, extended run on Broadway, comedian Alex Edelman brings his solo show to HBO in an all-new comedy special.

programmes.t: Godzilla X Kong: The New Empire
programmes.d: The epic battle continues. This time, the mighty Kong and the fearsome Godzilla must unite against a colossal, undiscovered threat hidden within the planet.
A tense action-thriller led by John Travolta. A professional thief attempts his biggest heist with his brother. However, things go wrong.
An all-star cast propels this dark comedy crime thriller. As an ex-criminal and his family enjoy a peaceful winter break, his old life unexpectedly shows up for a chaotic reunion.
An all-star cast propels this dark comedy crime thriller. As an ex-criminal and his family enjoy a peaceful winter break, his old life unexpectedly shows up for a chaotic reunion.
Almost unimaginable after the mega-success of 'Mad Max', the sequel came in bigger, better, bolder, securing Mel Gibson a place in the post-apocalyptic action genre forever.
A great coming-of-age film. Two academic overachievers realise that high school is over and they haven't lived. So, they try to cram in as much fun into one night as possible.
Tom Hanks stars as a widower whose young son calls a radio station looking for a new wife for his depressed dad. An enduring romantic classic directed by Nora Ephron.

programmes.t: Get Me To 21 The Jenna Lowe Story
programmes.d: A moving, inspiring, and informative documentary about Gabi Lowe and her family's four-year battle to save her terminally ill daughter Jenna.
A 13-year-old girl decides to do an assignment on her mother, but realises she doesn't know much about her. To find out all she can, she visits her uncle in LA.
Trucks and monsters come together to create a non-stop action adventure. A teenager forms a bond with a creature that's being hunted by an evil oil company and fights to save it.
This romantic comedy with an all-star cast follows the stories of couples, their make-ups, break-ups and all the expectations and pressures that Valentine's Day brings.
A man's perfect world is turned upside down when his wife leaves him. Now single, he enlists the help of a so-called ladies' man to navigate the unfamiliar dating scene.
The third Mad Max film sees an exiled Mel Gibson and a tribe of kids battle Tina Turner in a swirl of stunning stunts, gladiatorial fighting, and general post-nuclear mayhem.
Christoph Waltz stars as an ageing assassin forced to train his replacement. Asked to eliminate the top men of a rival crime syndicate, they realise their employer has other plans.
From the director of Tron, comes a sci-fi epic with Tom Cruise. As a drone repairman on an evacuated Earth, Cruise discovers a spacecraft that will change everything he knew.
The risks are twice as high in this sequel to the 2024 crime action. Mason (John Travolta) and his crew attempt a high-stakes casino heist to save his kidnapped girlfriend.
If you love Jason Statham, you will love him in this high-octane action film. In the not-too-distant future, a reality TV show uses prisoners in a deadly race for entertainment.
If you love Jason Statham, you will love him in this high-octane action film. In the not-too-distant future, a reality TV show uses prisoners in a deadly race for entertainment.
The creator of The Professional and Lucy, Luc Besson, delivers his brand of powerful, stylised action with deadly precision. Follows the chaos left by a lethal government assassin.
Starring Ben Foster and Michael Caine, this is an epic take on the true story of Jan Žižka, one of Czech history's greatest warriors, who is said to have never lost a battle.
A vengeful mother becomes the hunter in this gripping thriller. She lures her daughter's killer into her smart home for a twisted game of revenge.
Trucks and monsters come together to create a non-stop action adventure. A teenager forms a bond with a creature that's being hunted by an evil oil company and fights to save it.
BAFTA-winning director Joe Wright leads Keira Knightley in this period drama based on Jane Austen's classic novel. A rich single man falls for a woman who is beneath his class.
Rachel McAdams and Ryan Gosling star in this romantic tearjerker. After being separated, a couple who are passionately in love get a second chance at happiness.
Contemporary and fun, this acclaimed rom-com sees native New Yorker Rachel Chu head to Singapore to meet her boyfriend's family, who, unbeknownst to her, are all super-rich elites.
The usually charming Hugh Grant plays a self-centred exec who treats his star employee like his nanny. She finally quits with hilarious consequences.
Dennis Quaid takes centre stage in this third film in the successful franchise. Yet another great white shark invades the opening ceremonies of a marine park in Florida.
Acclaimed filmmaker Yimou Zhang helms this historical fantasy starring Matt Damon. An elite force of warriors must save humanity from a horde of monstrous creatures.
The son of Zeus must leave his peaceful life behind and become a warrior once again when his father is kidnapped. He enlists the help of a warrior queen to take on Zeus' captors.
Emmy-winning actor Bob Odenkirk leads this action thriller as an unassuming man who is driven to the edge after a home invasion. He goes into a rage to protect his family.
Scarlett Johansson (Avengers) stars in this pulsating action film. A woman accidentally absorbs an experimental drug during a black-market deal and is turned into a killing machine.
Scarlett Johansson (Avengers) stars in this pulsating action film. A woman accidentally absorbs an experimental drug during a black-market deal and is turned into a killing machine.
There is no way out in this gripping survival thriller. Six strangers wake up in a cornfield to find they are thrust into a deadly cat-and-mouse game with something mysterious.
Oscar winner Renée Zellweger reprises her role as unlikely heroine Bridget Jones, who, in this instalment, finds herself pregnant and only fifty percent sure of who the father could be.
Visionary director Christopher Nolan revisits the historical battle of Dunkirk in this Oscar-winning war drama about a devastating combat that turned the tide of World War II.
Jean Reno drives this charming and heartfelt story inspired by a true story. A heartbroken fisherman forms an unlikely bond with a penguin he rescued from an oil spill.
A game of cat and mouse unfolds in this exciting action movie. Oscar-winner Tommy Lee Jones is a US Marshal hunting down an escaped prisoner, played by Wesley Snipes.
Tom Hanks stars as a widower whose young son calls a radio station looking for a new wife for his depressed dad. An enduring romantic classic directed by Nora Ephron.
Mark Wahlberg and Rose Byrne star in this great comedy about family. A couple bites off more than they can chew when they adopt three foster children.

programmes.t: Bridget Jones: The Edge Of Reason
programmes.d: This sequel to the sweet romcom classic sees Bridget Jones finally in a stable relationship with Mark Darcy. But doubts brew when her ex-lover Daniel Cleaver returns.
Mel Gibson plays a fearless bomb expert in this cyber-thriller. An ex-hacker is forced to break into high-level banking institutions while having a bomb strapped to his chair.
Matt Damon stars in this film that expertly blends smarts, emotion and gritty action. A man wakes up with amnesia and learns he's a human weapon the CIA wants eliminated.

programmes.t: Godzilla X Kong: The New Empire
programmes.d: The epic battle continues. This time, the mighty Kong and the fearsome Godzilla must unite against a colossal, undiscovered threat hidden within the planet.
Jeff Daniels stars in this crazy romcom about love, marriage, divorce and infatuation. A man must deal with the realities of his many strained relationships.
Angelina Jolie and James McAvoy push their bodies to the limit in this action blockbuster based on the hit comic book series about a secret league of superhuman assassins.
Angelina Jolie and James McAvoy push their bodies to the limit in this action blockbuster based on the hit comic book series about a secret league of superhuman assassins.
Almost unimaginable after the mega-success of 'Mad Max', the sequel came in bigger, better, bolder, securing Mel Gibson a place in the post-apocalyptic action genre forever.
Meryl Streep, Steve Martin and Alec Baldwin star in this rom-com about a love triangle that sees a divorced woman have an affair with her ex-husband while dating another man.
A vengeful mother becomes the hunter in this gripping thriller. She lures her daughter's killer into her smart home for a twisted game of revenge.

programmes.t: Get Me To 21 The Jenna Lowe Story
programmes.d: A moving, inspiring, and informative documentary about Gabi Lowe and her family's four-year battle to save her terminally ill daughter Jenna.
In this classic coming-of-age story, a young girl with a morbid outlook on life becomes distressed when her widowed father falls for another woman.
Vinnie Jones leads this crime thriller. A high-stakes money laundering deal between London mobsters and a West Virginia oilman turns sour after an incident.
A gripping drama thriller. When an investment broker learns the power of hypnosis, he uses this skill to get what he wants, leading him to something he didn't see coming.
Ethan Hawke takes on a dual role in this gripping war thriller. An American soldier stationed in Rome must stop an imminent terrorist threat to the Vatican.
A talented high school basketball player faces the challenges of family, love, and pursuing his NBA dreams in this inspiring coming-of-age tale.
Cute romantic comedy with funny woman Tina Fey (30 Rock). A Princeton admissions officer has a tough choice to make when she meets an applicant who could be the son she gave up for adoption.
It's chaos from start to finish in the live-action version of a cartoon favourite. While being his usual menace to the neighbourhood, Dennis must take on a cat burglar.
Damon Wayans stars in this light-hearted military comedy. A former marine finds it hard adjusting to civilian life and so uses his extreme methods at a school military programme.
The beloved cartoon character gets his own comedy. When a documentary filmmaker arrives at Jellystone Park to shoot a project, she quickly crosses paths with the infamous Yogi Bear.
An uplifting animation. A group of 'ugly' dolls leaves their home Uglyville and goes into the world, where they learn that they are different. They embark on a journey of self-love.
A fun kids' animation that shows you do not have to be big to be brave. A young beluga whale embarks on a perilous journey to fulfil his ailing grandmother's last wish.
Denzel Washington stars in this Spike Lee crime drama. A seasoned detective, a bank robber and a bank president face off in a high stakes hostage situation.
Sandra Bullock returns as FBI Agent Gracie Hart in this comedy, and this time she investigates the disappearance of the new Miss United States.
Rowan Atkinson returns as the bumbling secret agent and takes on another mission. He must stop a group of international assassins before they eliminate a world leader.
Leonardo DiCaprio and Djimon Hounsou drive this thriller about redemption. A mercenary entangled in illegal diamonds decides to help a fisherman trying to save his family.
Leonardo DiCaprio and Djimon Hounsou drive this thriller about redemption. A mercenary entangled in illegal diamonds decides to help a fisherman trying to save his family.
Proving you can't keep a good horror franchise down, Scream 2 is set two years after the tragic events at Woodsboro, when a movie based on the murders sparks the killer's return.
A Sylvester Stallone crime thriller. After getting amnesia from a failed robbery, a man is given a drug that stimulates memory. Now on the run, he fights the clock and his past.
M-Net Movies viewers become stars in this action comedy. After wrecking their boss's car, two friends are inspired by different movies to help get out of their mess.
This tragic Oscar-nominated romantic drama gives two lost lovers another chance. After twenty years apart, childhood sweethearts reunite for one fateful week in New York City.
An engrossing thriller starring Mel Gibson. A conspiracy theory-obsessed New York cab driver becomes a target for the CIA when one of his theories happens to be true.

programmes.t: Journey To The Center Of The Earth
programmes.d: Josh Hutcherson (The Hunger Games) has an unforgettable adventure in this fantasy film about a boy and his uncle who take a thrilling trip beneath the earth's surface.

programmes.t: The Nut Job 2: Nutty By Nature
programmes.d: A silly adventure ensues for Surly the squirrel in this fun sequel. When the mayor of Oakton City plots to destroy their home, Surly and his friends must do all they can to stop him.
A touching film. After rescuing a dolphin from a trap, a boy learns that the animal's tail must be amputated, prompting him to convince a marine biologist to devise a solution.
It's man versus nature in this thrilling disaster film. A group of storm chasers and the residents of a small town try and survive a tornado superstorm.
Liam Neeson leads this riveting film about a diamond mine that collapses in Canada. A 'big-rig' road driver leads a rescue mission over a frozen lake to save some trapped miners.
Dwayne Johnson and Jason Statham drive this epic spin-off to the Fast franchise. They team up to stop a fierce Idris Elba, who plays a mercenary with a deadly virus.
In this serendipitous movie Jennifer Lopez is a woman who's given up on love. She decides to undergo artificial insemination only to meet the man of her dreams later on that day.
Chris Pine directs and leads this star-studded quirky comedy. A Los Angeles pool cleaner is recruited by a femme fatale to help uncover corruption in a shady business deal.
Chris Pine directs and leads this star-studded quirky comedy. A Los Angeles pool cleaner is recruited by a femme fatale to help uncover corruption in a shady business deal.
Kevin Hart and Tiffany Haddish face off in this hilarious comedy. A group of misfit grown-ups are forced to take night classes to get their high school qualifications.
This explosive film won an Oscar for Original Song and earned Terrence Howard a nomination for his electric performance. Follow a pimp trying to escape 'the life' through hip-hop.
Sylvester Stallone stars in this action classic. A notorious cop and psychopathic killer who were cryogenically frozen are defrosted years later, with chilling results.
Denzel Washington stars alongside Viola Davis, who earned an Oscar for her role. This 50s drama navigates the complex relationship of a working-class African-American family.
M-Net Movies viewers become stars in this action comedy. After wrecking their boss's car, two friends are inspired by different movies to help get out of their mess.
An animation that is filled with hope and wonder. A young boy who doubts Santa's existence joins other kids on a magical train journey to the North Pole on Christmas Eve.
Morgan Freeman and Ashley Judd star in this sequel about friendship as a group of people in a marine hospital try and help a dolphin find a companion.
The laughs keep coming in this animated superhero adventure. A cooler-than-ever Batman discovers that he's accidentally adopted a teenage orphan who wants to become his sidekick.
A musical adventure filled with heart, hilarity and happiness. When their village is invaded by the grumpy Bergens, two mismatched friends must work together to save the day.
Entertainment Queen Latifah stars in this humorous holiday movie. Diagnosed with a terminal illness, she takes a vacation, but gets far more than she bargained for.
This prequel to the trilogy tells an intriguing origin story of a young Coriolanus Snow, 64 years before his reign.
Liam Neeson must save his family in this action thriller. A bank executive receives a bomb threat while driving his children to school that his car will explode if they leave.
Owen Wilson stars in this chaotic romcom. Two men are given a week off from marriage by their wives, with the freedom to do whatever they want with whoever they want.
Owen Wilson stars in this chaotic romcom. Two men are given a week off from marriage by their wives, with the freedom to do whatever they want with whoever they want.
You never understand a person until you walk in their shoes. In this funny film, a racist whose daughter dates a black man wakes up in a black man's body.
Adam Sandler proves his versatility in this buddy action comedy that sees a small-time thief forced to team up with a cop that once betrayed him, played by Damon Wayans.
A gripping drama thriller. When an investment broker learns the power of hypnosis, he uses this skill to get what he wants, leading him to something he didn't see coming.
This thriller sees Bruce Willis embroiled in a deadly situation. A retired cop steps in to save a hiker who witnesses a crime committed by rogue cops.
A touching and inspiring biopic focused on the life of a prominent US freedom fighter. Harriet Tubman escapes slavery and devotes her life to abolishing the practice.
A picture-perfect adventure awaits Kate Winslet and Cameron Diaz in this sweet rom-com. Two women swap homes for the holidays - and learn a few lessons in love.
Freddie Prinze Jr. (Head Over Heels) stars in this high school romcom. After a popular boy in school gets dumped, he makes a bet that he can turn a nerd into a prom queen.
Television's favourite babies get their own feature film, and it is filled with a whole lot of trouble as Tommy, Chuckie and the gang get themselves lost in the forest.
A star-studded cast ensures this Academy Award-nominated classic will amuse adults and kids alike. A prehistoric family goes on the journey of a lifetime.
A laugh-a-minute South African comedy about love and rivalry. A young couple falls for each other - despite their families' best efforts to keep them apart.
A great ensemble cast shows that you're never too old to follow your dreams. A group of elderly women from a retirement community form a cheerleading squad and enter a competition.
East meets West in this epic Asian fantasy film. Matrix star Keanu Reeves leads a group of 47 warriors into battle against deadly mystical forces.
The saying, 'desperate times call for desperate measures', proves true in this action-packed film. Four Black women resort to robbing banks to end their struggles.
The saying, 'desperate times call for desperate measures', proves true in this action-packed film. Four Black women resort to robbing banks to end their struggles.
Vin Diesel is a man driven by revenge in this action movie. When a drug cartel kills the wife of a successful DEA agent, he takes matters into his own hands and hunts them down.
An all-star cast drives this crazy comedy about family greed. Two sisters try to win over their wealthy aunt in hopes of inheriting, but their family members also have the same idea.

programmes.t: The Last Voyage Of The Demeter
programmes.d: A terrifying story based on a chapter from Bram Stoker's 'Dracula' novel. A cargo ship sets sail from Carpathia to London, but soon the trip turns into a fight for survival.
Ethan Hawke takes on a dual role in this gripping war thriller. An American soldier stationed in Rome must stop an imminent terrorist threat to the Vatican.
Vin Diesel (Furious 7) reprises his role as Riddick for this pulsating sequel to the cult classic. He battles the Necromongers, an evil empire intent on ruling the universe.

programmes.t: Sherlock Holmes: A Game Of Shadows
programmes.d: Robert Downey Jr and Jude Law return for another action-packed mystery. This time Holmes is on the trail of Professor Moriarty who is committing crimes across Europe.
A fun family film. When Ella encounters Joey, a baby kangaroo, she has no idea that Joey has a magical diamond that crooks are after, leading her on a quest to get Joey to safety.
This upbeat, endearing, musical comedy earned Jack Black a Golden Globe nomination as he gave a class of preppy students a music lesson in rock and roll they'll never forget.
An enchanting family animation. Mosley rebels from a life of servitude to uncover the origins of his species after learning that his fellow thoriphants used to stand upright.
Denzel Washington stars in this Spike Lee crime drama. A seasoned detective, a bank robber and a bank president face off in a high stakes hostage situation.
Kevin Hart delivers a livewire performance in this buddy-cop comedy about a security guard trying to prove himself to his girlfriend's top cop brother (Ice Cube).
All hell breaks loose in this action comedy starring John Cena and Alison Brie. An ex-special forces operative is hired to protect a journalist as she interviews a dictator.
Oscar winner Denzel Washington stars in this crime driven biopic set in the 70s. A hard, honest cop works to take down a new heroin kingpin who has secured the underworld.
Oscar winner Denzel Washington stars in this crime driven biopic set in the 70s. A hard, honest cop works to take down a new heroin kingpin who has secured the underworld.
Dwayne Johnson leads this larger-than-life monster movie. After animals are infected by a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop their deadly rampage.
An action-packed thriller about a petty criminal attempting to flee with cocaine and money he stole from a ruthless crime boss. He is badly wounded and has few choices to survive.
A gritty, action-packed film. A former police officer puts aside his differences with the force and teams up with a younger detective to find his brother's murderer.
This tragic Oscar-nominated romantic drama gives two lost lovers another chance. After twenty years apart, childhood sweethearts reunite for one fateful week in New York City.

First up, they dig into Canada's longest-running bar and pull out nine tables from the tavern owned by Henri 'Pocket Rocket' Richard.

programmes.t: The Hunt: In Search Of Australia's...
programmes.d: 'The Hunt: In Search Of Australia's Big Cats. S1/E1 - 1/1'. Panthers and pumas are alive and well in the Australian bush and Vaughan King is on a quest to prove it.

programmes.t: The Hunt: In Search Of Australia's...

'Junk & Disorderly: Henry's Wreck-Trospective. S1/E6 - The Fairford Wreck-Trospective'. This time, Henry and Guy buy a jaw-dropping assortment of signs and cans and quickly get to work restoring them.

S1 E1 England
England's castle walls have witnessed centuries of bloodshed. This programme presents spine tingling stories in a riveting tour of England's ghostly heritage.
S1 E1 The de Havilland Comet introduced jet travel over the Mediterranean, but a series of accidents led to investigations into reasons like human error, mechanical failure, and even UFOs.

S24 E6 Pawned Lightnin'
Rick and Corey take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie 'Grease'. Is the flaming hotrod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

S24 E7 Blast From The Past
A customer walks in with a Tommy Boy film poster signed by actor Chris Farley. Meanwhile, Rick tries not to slip up making a deal on a pair of WW2 snow shoes.

S24 E8 Fender Vendor
When Rick takes a swing at a Honus Wagner baseball card, will it be the real deal? Chum strums a custom Fender by popular guitar maker John Carruthers.

S24 E9 Pawntourage
Things go nuclear when a Japanese Godzilla toy hits the counter. Can Corey come out on top before he's crushed? Next, Chum does battle over a leather jacket from WW2 - but will his offer bomb?

S2 E1 Bigger Stronger Meaner Dumber
Roy hires bodyguards to keep the riffraff away at an auction in Brampton. Bogart quits... but can Paul pull him back in? Rick and Cindy make a discovery, and Ursula gets carried away.

S2 E2 That's Mr Pecker To You
Roy's arch-nemesis, auctioneer Patrick Pecker, calls an auction on Weston Road. While Roy seeks to lift the curse, Ursula works her charm. Meanwhile, Bogart reads Paul the riot-shirt.

S8 E36 Judge's Takeover: Ben Abbott
In this special competition, every aspect of the challenge will be decided by two-time champion Ben Abbott. Four smiths must recreate the billhook knife, a weapon dear to Ben's heart.

S8 E38 Damascus 500
Four smiths hit the fast track in a race to make a Damascus blade with the highest layer count. The winner will get extra time in round two, and the loser with the lowest layer count will be eliminated.

S1 E4 Forgotten Cities And Lost Sanctuaries
Each episode combines CGI, expert testimony, and location shooting to examine extraordinary finds brought to light by disasters ranging from earthquakes to droughts and floods.

S13 E3 Billion Dollar Baby
After the team makes an ancient discovery on Lot 5, they learn that the fabled treasure could be worth more than anyone imagined.

S2 E13 Schlock Therapy
Roy antagonises the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans.

S2 E14 Cougar Pants
Cindy and Rick go on the prowl for fresh lockers at an auction in downtown Toronto. Unforeseen expenses force Ursula to reconsider her attitude towards stripping. Roy crashes hard.

S2 E15 Confessions Of A Dangerous Mime
Much to his own amusement (and no one else's), Roy brings a mime to an auction. Rick and Cindy arrive in a fouler mood than usual, and Bogart hopes to whip Paul into shape.

S16 E10 Mystery Of The Stone Spheres
There are mysterious ancient stones shaped into perfect spheres. Many of them show clear evidence of being manmade and some completely defy explanation.

S16 E11 The Lost City Of The Maya
Considered by many to be the greatest civilization in the history of the Americas, the Maya thrived for more than 2,000 years.

S1 E1 Submarines War Beneath The Waves
Follow a new perspective on the military, political and domestic issues of the time, whilst revealing human stories and engineering marvels.

S1 E2 Tinley Park
A strange formation is seen in the sky over the sleepy suburbs of Tinley Park. The lights return for a second time almost to the date the following year.

S2 E2 Sacred Strongholds
There are strongholds built to protect the sacred, like an impenetrable wall or a mystical river. But there are others used for more sinister purposes.

S8 E41 Judges Takeover: Dave Baker
In this special competition, four smiths must recreate one of renowned Hollywood weapons maker Dave Baker's favourite weapons, the Bone Daddy Fantasy Seax.

S8 E46 Beat The Unbeaten: Round One
Competitor turned judge Ben Abbott remains undefeated in the forge, but that could soon change. In the first part of a five-episode challenge, three smiths compete in one five-hour round.

S24 E11 Maximum Pawnage
Chum finds a 1920s Baccarat bottle for Ybry perfume. Rick examines a sealed 'Spiderman and Venom: Maximum Carnage' video game. Corey evaluates an 1800s gambling kit.

S2 E16 Utopia?
The buyers head to the tiny hamlet of Utopia, hoping that the auction lives up to its name. Roy has a pocket full of cash and he's not afraid to bribe, and Ursula runs afoul of some fowl.

S2 E17 Three Kennys Are Worse Than None
Paul and Bogart arrive at an auction in Brampton with their new 'secret weapon': Paul's hopelessly inexperienced brother Barry.

S2 E18 Instigator In Training
Roy shows his nephew what being an instigator is all about at an auction in South Etobicoke. Bogart wants a new catchphrase, but even Paul thinks it's silly.

S2 E2 Million Mummy Necropolis & The Enigmatic Horseshoe
An ancient cemetery in Egypt yields over a million naturally preserved burials. In France, a horseshoe-shaped monument reveals links to ancient weaponry and ritual.

S10 E17 Junkyard Meltdown
After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex Broadsword featuring an unusual snake-shaped grind.

S1 E4 The Vessels That Saved D-Day
A chronological telling of the dramatic D-Day story, focusing on the vessels that made the landings possible.

S1 E2 The First Metal Warships
The US became a global superpower when the USS Olympia won the Battle of Manila Bay. Plus, the British HMS Dreadnought brought ship design into the 20th century.

S1 E4 Sedona
A sacred place, Sedona is known for its unusual occurrences. With all the activity that's been recorded here, it could double for an intergalactic airport. But what is drawing UFOs to this spot?

S1 E5 The Pine Barrens

S8 E48 Beat The Unbeaten: Broken Blade Revenge
Three smiths who suffered broken blades at the hand of Ben Abbott hope to rewrite history in a single 5-hour round.

S24 E12 Yay Or Neigh?
When a rare H.G. Wells book find its way to the shop, will Corey shoot for the stars? There's no horsing around when a statue made of turquoise moseys on in. Will it be a yay, or a neigh for Rick?

S2 E19 Goji, Bogie And The Yogi
Bogart's hooked on the revitalising powers of goji berry juice, and he plans to spread the word at an auction in Milton. Roy arrives in white, looking to spread peace, joy and distraction.

S2 E20 Exceedingly Loud And Uncomfortably Close
Roy aims to throw other buyers off by invading their personal space at an auction in Mississauga. Paul and Bogart are clueless about finding a gift for Bogart's fiancée.

S2 E21 Pranking The Monkeys
Roy makes mischief at an auction in Toronto with a full assortment of classic pranks. Rick and Cindy resort to flashing to grab Don's attention.

S1 E3 Hanoi Hilton
The Hanoi Hilton is perhaps the most famous American POW prison of the Vietnam War located in the city of Hanoi. In Vietnamese its name literally means 'hell hole'.

S1 E4 Sing Sing
A maximum-security prison on the banks of the Hudson, just 30 miles north of New York City, it gave rise to the term 'being sent up the river'.

S1 E6 Rattenkrieg
From the Indian border in Burma to China, which has been at war with Japan since 1937, the war grows more savage. In Europe, Hitler renews his assault on the Soviet Union.

S1 E5 Torpedo Boats At War
John F Kennedy first made news in 1943 when, as a skipper of a torpedo boat in the Pacific, he and his crew were shipwrecked. We tell the story of their rescue.

S1 E6 Cold War Warriors

S1 E6 Falkirk Triangle
With more than 300 UFO sightings each year, the townspeople living within the Falkirk Triangle can't help but feel uneasy about the strange occurrences.

S2 E37 Gretel tries to hang with the cool kids and must protect them from a disgraced mascot, Kevin and Anthony's desire to be on a prank show threatens their friendship.

S3 E99 Blackout/What'd I Miss?
Candace is put in charge of the boys right before the entire city loses electricity.

programmes.t: In the Line of Duty III
programmes.d: Two notorious thieves escape to Hong Kong after committing a jewellery heist in Japan. Madam Yeung and a Japanese inspector must team up to bring them to justice.
In this slapstick comedy, an all-female police squad encounters sexism and conflicts during training, but must band together to take down a group of terrorists.
A blind former detective, who possesses an uncanny ability to solve cold cases for police reward, teams up with a hit team detective in search of her missing friend.
In this sequel, the female police squad members struggle to blend in with the new recruits, and must also join the Special Duty Unit to capture an escaped prisoner.
A triad boss' elite guards need to protect him from assassination. As one guard witnesses the elimination of other triad bosses, he unravels a huge conspiracy.
An elite cop fulfils his dream to join the Special Duty Unit, facing rigorous training and the challenge of stopping a daring heist by a gang of dangerous criminals.

Set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, a young man Chen Zhen, rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.
Hong Kong's up-and-coming actor William Chan stars as a gangster who rise through the ranks to become the no. 1 triad gangster in Hong Kong!
A benevolent fisherman living a simple life is reluctantly drawn into helping a noble emperor regain his throne from his evil brother.
Monkey King emerges after Goddess Nuwa's sacrifice to challenge the Jade Emperor, causing chaos that enables Buffalo Demon to wage war in heaven.
An early 20th century family dispute over property. After the death of an aged man, his young widow fights for what is rightfully hers.

Paige and Cody face more setbacks when two workers leave the site and a trailer breaks down. Plus, Mike and Kathleen watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

S11 E7 Absolutely Insane
Mike and Teresa's team navigate slippery scaffolding. An ordering mistake costs Paige and Cody more time, while Mike and Kathleen deal with broken windowpanes.

S5 E6 Extra Mustard
Bobby takes on the build of a lifetime - a hot dog truck. Andy would never approve, so Bobby suggests he attend a car show out of town to get him out of the way.
S1 E5 Mike takes the family on a trip down memory lane. He finds new cars for his dad and sister and helps Richard Hammond's mum sell her MX5 for charity.
S1 E6 A visit to a popular car show inspires Mike to organise his own event in an effort to promote his expanding business - but will anyone turn up?
S1 E3 Appraiser Nick Smith evaluates a 1981 Pontiac Bonneville wagon and a 1967 Ford Mustang. A '73 Cadillac El Dorado has an impressive Indy 500 pedigree.
S1 E4 Dennis Pittsenbarger travels across the US to uncover antique cars. From vintage motors to old hot rod shells, these dusty discoveries could be worth a fortune.

S5 E8 Money's On The Finish Line
Andy buys a stolen and stripped Porsche C4S at an auction, but Bobby has his doubts. Dave works overtime to beef up a '57 Belair for a drag race.

S5 E9 Cashin' In
Between tracking down body parts for the stripped Porsche and helping a client modernize a vintage hot rod, Andy has fallen behind - and Bob's not happy!

S3 E6 Nehi Bottling Plant
Mike salvages large industrial doors from the old Nehi Bottling Plant in Covington. Back at the shop, Robert and Tay work on a gate made from a bicycle.

S3 E7 Byrd Log Cabin
The Salvage Dawgs team returns to a previously salvaged house to save its original log structure. Plus, Mike builds an end table for the property owner.

S3 E8 Meek Farmhouse
Mike and Robert remove a two-piece staircase from a farmhouse in Marion. Back at the shop, Mike builds a bar from panel doors as a surprise for a customer's husband.

S10 E3 Homestead Closed - Part 1
Alaska's pandemic stay-at-home order is a challenge for the Kilchers. Resources are stretched, schooling proves difficult and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

S10 E4 Homestead Closed - Part 2
Alaska's pandemic stay-at-home order is a challenge for the Kilchers. Resources are stretched, schooling proves difficult and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

S11 E8 It's Gonna Be Plush
All three builds near completion. Paige and Cody race to finish before dog racing season, while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the mountains.

S1 E2 South Dakota Shoot Out
A returning client hires Ron and John to construct a 10-gun, camping-themed shooting gallery featuring an animatronic hillbilly bear, for his flagship store.

S1 E8 Trapped
The Raneys assist two Montana homesteaders who face being trapped on their property. When a medical emergency strikes, the Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

S1 E9 Drowning
In Hawaii the Raneys attempt to save two homesteaders whose dream homestead lays a flash-flood zone. As the weather closes in, can they save the property from the water?

S14 E1 1995 Ford Escort RS Cosworth
Mike gets his hands on a valuable 1995 Ford Escort RS Cosworth. Can new mechanic Ant Anstead bring back the 227 hp engine's famous 'fizz'?

S14 E2 Toyota Supra
Mike hopes to capitalise on '80s nostalgia by restoring an original 1982 Toyota Supra. Can Ant bring this car into the modern era without losing its originality?

S8 E4 Deep Cycle Batteries/Tins/Optical Lenses
Find out how deep cycle batteries, optical lenses and tins are produced, as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

S8 E5 Horseshoes/Dishwashers/Graphite Fly Rods/Frozen Pizzas
Find out how horseshoes, dishwashers, graphite fly rods and frozen pizzas are all made, as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

S6 E2 Pompeii's Mysterious Twin
Along with Pompeii, Mount Vesuvius left another mysterious Roman settlement buried beneath its ashes. Experts reveal new evidence.

S10 E5 Emergency! - Part 1
The cattle drive is threatened by a runaway stallion, Eivin suffers a serious injury in his workshop and Atz Sr requires emergency surgery.

S10 E6 Emergency! - Part 2
The cattle drive is threatened by a runaway stallion, Eivin suffers a serious injury in his workshop and Atz Sr requires emergency surgery.
S3 E11 Follows the interventions of the Security and Customs Services at the borders of Spain who are under the constant threat from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

S1 E5 Hunting The Rioters
After the murders of three schoolgirls, riots break out across Britain. Police are outnumbered but then use cameras to hunt down and arrest rioters.

S1 E10 Hotel
Bluey and Bingo run a crazy 'Hotel' with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.

S3 E105 Obstacle Course
Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her.

S2 E27 Seesaw
Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

S1 E52 Verandah Santa
It's Christmas Eve and Dad and the kids are taking turns pretending to be Santa.
S1 E1 At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programmes.t: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programmes.d:
S1 E4 Upsy Daisy
When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

S1 E26 Mojo Draws the Line
Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

S3 E9 Andy and the Swift Fox Pups
Andy and Jen are sent to North America to check on a swift fox mum who has been left to bring up four cubs on her own.

S1 E18 Chalicothere and Claw
Andy breaks a museum artefact, and must travel 30 million years back in time to replace it. Once there, he tracks down a chalicothere but gets chased by a swarm of prehistoric hornets.

S1 E19 Magyarosaurus and Reeds
Andy travels back 70 million years to meet the miniature magyarosaurus, but when he arrives on their prehistoric island home he has to hide from a giant flying reptile.

S1 E20 Andrewsarchus and Tooth
Andy travels back in time 36 million years to find a giant carnivorous predator's tooth, but when his backpack is stolen, he enlists the help of a herd of giant brontothere to get it back.

S1 E21 Woolly Mammoth and Ice
Andy dons his winter coat and heads back in time 30000 years to the last ice age.

S1 E9 Barbary Macaques
Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rock of Gibraltar, in Europe, to count all the barbary macaques that live there.

S1 E6 The Egg Thief!
Did oviraptors really steal other dinosaurs' eggs? A pair of protoceratops are about to find out!

S1 E31 Andy and The Humpback Whale
Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the Pacific Ocean, off the coast of Mexico. His mission, to record a male humpback whale.

S1 E32 Andy and The Manakin
Andy heads to Central America in search of the manakin bird, so he can learn its amazing dance moves.

S1 E33 Andy and The Snares Penguins
When the Snare's penguins at Safari World get caked in mud, Andy jets off to New Zealand to find out how these forest dwelling penguins get clean.

S1 E34 Andy and The Ring Tailed Lemurs
When Andy accidentally breaks a plaster cast of a ring tailed lemur's footprint that Mr Hammond made, it's up to Andy to put things right.

S1 E35 Andy and The Bobcat
When Mr Hammond asks Andy to take pictures of a Bobcat, a wild cat that lives in North America, Andy jets off in his safari mobile and track one down.

S1 E36 Andy and The Black Crested Macaques
When Andy mistakenly eats a bowl of exotic fruit salad that Mr Hammond left for the black crested macaques, Andy jets off to Sulawesi in search of more.

S3 E7 Andy and the Blue Duck Chicks
Andy, Jen and Scout head to New Zealand on a baby animal mission to help rescue a family of blue ducks and their chicks from a fast flowing river.

S3 E9 Andy and the Swift Fox Pups
Andy and Jen are sent to North America to check on a swift fox mum who has been left to bring up four cubs on her own.

S1 E1 Dinosaurs Can't Fly!
Could any of the big and mighty dinosaurs fly? Velociraptor is on a mission to find out!

S1 E2 Learning To Swim
What do you need to be a super swimmer? Baby spinosaurus goes on a quest to find out!

S3 E4 Dock Machines
Motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing machines that work in docks!

S3 E5 Off-road Machines
Grace shows off three amazing machines that are built to travel off-road!

S3 E5 Off-road Machines
Grace shows off three amazing machines that are built to travel off-road!

S1 E5 Dandelions
Discover how dandelions play an important role in the environment.
S1 E6 Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how seaweed plays such an important role in the environment.
S1 E7 Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how the tide plays such an important role in the environment.

S1 E7 Towel
Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

S1 E26 Mojo Draws the Line
Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

S1 E7 Runaway Tour
Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

S1 E8 Watch the Birdie
Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.
S2 E17 The Octonauts get more than they bargained for when they use the Octopod to transport a pair of invasive lionfish back to their native habitat.
S2 E18 When two young leafy sea dragons are accidentally separated from their father and brought onboard the Octopod, the Octonauts must find them before they end up in Kwazii's stew!
S1 E7 Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.
S1 E10 Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

S1 E7 Towel
Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!
S2 E3 Peso must perform an emergency fin bandage on a hungry great white shark, but first they need to subdue the giant predator using a trick called 'tonic immobility.'.
S2 E4 Kwazii finds a mysterious, unbreakable coconut, so the Octonauts seek out the help of some large, island-dwelling coconut crabs to open it.

S1 E9 Pirate Parade
Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

S3 E105 Obstacle Course
Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her.

S1 E9 Horsey Ride
When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

S1 E10 Hotel
Bluey and Bingo run a crazy 'Hotel' with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.

S1 E5 Shadowlands
On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. Coco keeps taking shortcuts so Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

S1 E6 The Weekend
At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad doesn't notice.

S1 E7 BBQ
It's lunchtime on Bluey's deck! But the BBQ needs a salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of capsicum her cousins asked for!

S1 E8 Fruit Bat
Not wanting to go to bed, Bluey tries to dream about being a nocturnal fruit bat so she can stay up all night long and soon finds herself flying through the night sky.

S1 E11 Bike
Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

S1 E12 Bob Bilby
When it's Bingo's turn to bring her Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to show him a good time.

S1 E38 Mayor Stan
Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

S1 E13 Mission: Pet Shop
Mum gives Rayane and his hearing dog Diesel a mission to get some dog food and a new toy.

S1 E14 Mission: Post Box
Dr Amit has a very important letter to post. But first, he and Kika need to buy a stamp at the shop in time to catch the last post.

S2 E85 Bad Mood
Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad, standing on his feet as Dad stomps around the house, controlling everything Bingo does and causing chaos.

S7 E20 T
Dee encourages a friend to say 't', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We meet a turtle, shake our tails and see a tiger in a tall tent!

S4 E2 Now You See Us
The Numberblocks discover a magic spell that makes them all invisible, and it's time to learn how to write numbers with Numberblocks Zero to Nine.

S3 E110 Unicorse
Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.
S2 E19 Evil Pea uses a remote control to drive the Tato Team to the far side of the supermarket. Can they return and save the fruit and veggie aisle?

S1 E6 Veggie Birthday Song
It's Supertato to the rescue! Sing along to some of Supertato's songs as he saves his veggie friends from Evil Pea. Go, go, go, Supertato!
S2 E20 Chilli is excited to see Jalapeno attempt a tart-jumping record. But when Evil Pea ruins the attempt in order to steal the record, Supertato and Captain Chilli must save the day!

S3 E138 Stories
Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

S3 E139 Puppets
Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

S3 E131 Turtle Boy
Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

S6 E22 The Only Way is Pirate
Ahoy there! A team of daring young swashbucklers battle naughty pirates and a stern Captain to win jewels for their treasure chest. Cook and Line are auditioning for a TV programme!

S6 E23 Storm's A'Coming
Captain HeyHo's finger is twitching and this can only mean one thing - a storm's a'coming. It's up to Cook and Line to do all they can to prepare for the storm.

S1 E7 BBQ
It's lunchtime on Bluey's deck! But the BBQ needs a salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of capsicum her cousins asked for!

S1 E8 Fruit Bat
Not wanting to go to bed, Bluey tries to dream about being a nocturnal fruit bat so she can stay up all night long and soon finds herself flying through the night sky.

S1 E9 Horsey Ride
When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

S3 E131 Turtle Boy
Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

S3 E132 Onesies
When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

S3 E133 Tradies
Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

S1 E28 Grannies
A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

S1 E9 Horsey Ride
When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

S5 E19 The Laughter Badge
From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

S5 E20 The Midnight Badge
Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

S6 E16 Silent Disco
Captain HeyHo likes her peace and quiet. Unfortunately for her, Cook and Line have found an old boombox, which is very loud and still working perfectly!

S1 E10 Wiggly Wool Picture
Mister Maker makes a crazy creature from an old scarf, and shows us how to make a castle at the Mini Makers' school.

S1 E10 Mae-Mae's Precious Pearl
Mae-Mae finds a very precious pearl on the beach. But when the pearl is taken, the friends must go on a submarine adventure to get it back.

S1 E4 Episode 4
A shoemaker and his wife have magical assistance from some elves every evening when they go to bed. But do the elves need help too?

S1 E10 Banana's Star Appeal
Banana superstar's show is stopped when Pea steals his peel. Supertato races against Evil Pea to get it back but trouble hits when a giant Banana statue collapses onto the stage.

S1 E6 Veggie Birthday Song
It's Supertato to the rescue! Sing along to some of Supertato's songs as he saves his veggie friends from Evil Pea. Go, go, go, Supertato!

S4 E2 The New Captain
Captain Captain declares she is there to guard the jewels and will be running a tight ship. Gem is ready for the challenge and meets her team of Swashbucklers.

S3 E115 Housework
Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

S1 E10 Bedtime
Andy Day takes a look at young animals as they learn how to make a place to rest. In Tibet, bar-headed geese make a soft nest out of feathers.

S3 E10 Andy and the Baby Kangaroos
Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach.

S2 E66 Queens
During a game of Queens, Bluey and Bingo find that playing the butler is much more fun. But someone must play the queen, even if it means not being afraid of a bit of hard work.

S1 E9 Ball
Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

S2 E24 Flatpack
While Mum and Dad struggle to build new flat-pack furniture, Bluey and Bingo transform the empty boxes into their own new world.

S1 E2 My Grandad Sometimes Steals My Chocolate Buttons
From tickles and piggybacks to no longer being able to do cartwheels, grandparents are brilliant!

S3 E147 Dragon
When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

S3 E144 Wild Girls
Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.
S2 E16 The Octonauts recruit a shape-shifting mimic octopus to help them recover an important vial of medicinal algae from a moray eel's lair.

S1 E8 Fruit Bat
Not wanting to go to bed, Bluey tries to dream about being a nocturnal fruit bat so she can stay up all night long and soon finds herself flying through the night sky.

S2 E35 The Golden Snuggybear
Supertato helps Tomato get a rare toy for his museum from a giant toy capsule vending machine, but Evil Pea traps them inside and takes it for herself!

S1 E7 How to be a Nitwit Superhero Song
Evil Pea is tired of everyone always cheering for Supertato. In this song she looks at all the things that make Supertato super, but realises that she loves being evil!

S2 E18 Mission: Catwalk
Tinks uses her super fetch skills and big dog energy to help Charli model some upcycled outfits at a Fashion Show.

S3 E152 Smoochy Kiss
Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

S1 E1 Mojo Mail
Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

S1 E22 Flock and Roll
It's hard enough for Mojo and Bo to help Jackson get all his sheep back in their pen, but it's even harder when the hungry sheep start chewing up Preston's flower festival!

S3 E141 Stickbird
On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

S4 E24 The Broken Bell
Captain Captain rings her bell and discovers that it's not ringing clearly. Cook and Line love the new sounds of the bell but are ordered by Captain Captain to fix it.

S4 E25 Cooling Captain Captain
It's sweltering on the Scarlet Squid today so Captain Captain orders her crew to find a way to cool her down. Gem meets her team: Sienna, Mason, Hammam and Melody.

S3 E142 Relax
Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

S2 E20 Series 2, Episode 20
Join Dillie Dally and the Hushabye Rocket as they take flight on a musical journey full of lullabies and cuddles to Planet Dream.

S3 E26 Fairy Tale
Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

S2 E27 Seesaw
Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

S2 E79 Movies
It's Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out.

S3 E137 Musical Statues
At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

S2 E81 Library
When Muffin is told that she is special by her dad, she interprets it as an excuse to do anything she wants, which means playing Bluey and Bingo's game of library her way.

S2 E103 Barky Boats
Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain, when the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

S3 E138 Stories
Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

S1 E10 Dot Pursuit
Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

S3 E19 Super Cannon
Captain Sinker orders a super-cannon to be delivered to the shipwreck, but it's smaller than she hoped it would be.

S1 E7 How to be a Nitwit Superhero Song
Evil Pea is tired of everyone always cheering for Supertato. In this song she looks at all the things that make Supertato super, but realises that she loves being evil!

S2 E36 Poor Little Pea
Evil Pea plans to break the Tatoscope by pretending she's hurt her foot and getting Supertato to invite her into Tato Tower to recover.

S3 E20 Hammocks
Captain Sinker hurts her back and orders a comfy bed from Cook and Line. Meanwhile, the Swashbucklers aim to win back all Gem's jewels.

S1 E10 When the Teletubbies give each other lots of lovely big hugs, a cuddly bear arrives to join in the fun! As they hug the bear, it changes colour! The Teletubbies wash their dirty knees and chase Po when she gets covered in mud.

S1 E1 Making Friends
Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and do some exercise.
S1 E11 The Teletubbies have fun surprising each other with a game of peekaboo, but who will get the biggest surprise? Then the Teletubbies find Halloween costumes inside a great big pumpkin.

S1 E10 Hoop
Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch needs some help from the Playtimers to make hoopy owl bagels. It's time for a tasty adventure!

S1 E23 Wingsuit Yourself
Tao needs help learning to fly his new wingsuit for a big town event, and Mojo and Bo are the experts. Can they help him find his inner bird before it's too late?

S1 E11 Space Picture
Watch today's episode to find out if Mister Maker can create a cute creature from pasta, clay, googly eyes and a pompom in under a minute.

S3 E105 Obstacle Course
Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her.

S3 E138 Stories
Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

S3 E139 Puppets
Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.
Bluey.

S3 E107 Omelette
Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

S2 E79 Movies
It's Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out.

S3 E104 Bedroom
Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings.
S1 E2 Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programmes.t: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programmes.d:
S1 E5 Pontipines
When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

S1 E1 Mojo Mail
Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

S3 E10 Andy and the Baby Kangaroos
Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach.

S1 E21 Woolly Mammoth and Ice
Andy dons his winter coat and heads back in time 30000 years to the last ice age.

S1 E22 Paraceratherium and Skin
Andy meets the largest mammal ever to walk the earth in prehistoric Mongolia.

S1 E23 Basilosaurus and Barnacles
Andy collects barnacles from a prehistoric ocean for his new museum display.

S1 E24 Australopithecus and Tool
Andy travels back in time to the Great Rift Valley in Africa to meet one of man's very own ancient ancestors, the australopithecus.

S1 E10 Blue Eyed Black Lemurs
Andy, Jen and Scout head to the island of Madagascar, off the coast of Southern Africa, to find out how blue-eyed black lemurs deal with itchy bugs.

S1 E7 What's For Lunch?
Carnotaurus is hungry, but what should he have for his lunch? Brachiosaurus, baryonyx and T-Rex help him find out what his sharp teeth are for.

S1 E13 Andy and the Chinstrap Penguins
Andy blasts off in his safari sub to Antarctica in search of chinstrap penguin chicks.

S1 E14 Andy and the Pygmy Gecko
Andy jets off in his safari mobile to the rainforest of Brazil in search of a pygmy gecko.

S1 E35 Andy and The Bobcat
When Mr Hammond asks Andy to take pictures of a Bobcat, a wild cat that lives in North America, Andy jets off in his safari mobile and track one down.

S1 E36 Andy and The Black Crested Macaques
When Andy mistakenly eats a bowl of exotic fruit salad that Mr Hammond left for the black crested macaques, Andy jets off to Sulawesi in search of more.

S1 E37 Andy and The Darkling Beetle
Andy checks out the Darkling Beetle, a nocturnal insect with bright markings. Andy heads to the Namib desert in Africa to discover how a darkling beetle drinks water.

S1 E38 Andy and The Flying Fox
Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Australia in search of little red flying foxes. Along the way he meets a frilled lizard.

S3 E8 Andy and the Grizzly Bear Cubs
Andy, Jen and Scout head to Alaska, in America, on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of fish being buried underground.

S3 E10 Andy and the Baby Kangaroos
Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach.

S1 E2 Learning To Swim
What do you need to be a super swimmer? Baby spinosaurus goes on a quest to find out!

S1 E3 The Greedy Dinosaur
To be a huge dinosaur, you have to eat your greens. But a baby brachiosaurus has been a bit too greedy!

S3 E6 Food Machines
Motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing food machines!

S3 E7 Passenger Machines
Grace explores three passenger machines! First, Grace gets to grips with a huge car ferry and shows off an eco-friendly solar train. Finally, she drives a fun tuk-tuk.

S3 E8 Fun Machines
Motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing machines that are all built for fun!
S1 E8 Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how the wind plays an important role in the environment.
S1 E9 Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how hedges play an important role in the environment.
S1 E10 Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how acorns play an important role in the environment.

S1 E8 Pockets
Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

S1 E1 Mojo Mail
Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

S1 E8 Watch the Birdie
Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

S1 E9 Pirate Parade
Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.
S2 E19 Running out of air, Barnacles struggles to free his paw from the mouth of a giant clam, while simultaneously directing his crew in a delicate Manatee rescue operation.

S2 E20 Episode 20
When a gigantic saltwater crocodile wanders into freezing waters, the Octonauts must figure out how to get the predator back to his warm water home - without anyone getting hurt.
S1 E8 Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.
S1 E11 How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

S1 E8 Pockets
Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

S1 E657 Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.
S1 E67 A tragedy breaks Ishani's dreams and alters her fate. With hope scarce, she travels to reinvent herself and discovers love along the way.
S1 E571 A Dreamy-eyed Sayali yearns for her prince charming, but fate pairs her with Sachin, a hero with a troubled past. Will her hopes for a fairytale life survive this twist of destiny?
S1 E118 A spirited girl runs a home food delivery service, crossing paths with a wealthy family where she brings warmth, love, and change in Banni Chow Home Delivery.
S1 E379 Every underdog has its day! Struggling lawyer Anjali Awasthi takes up a challenging case, all set for her big break. But can she fight the big guns? 148.
S1 E1781 After a dreamy and 'oh-so-happening' America visit, Anupama returns home. With new challenges and old conflicts to resolve, a new journey awaits her.
S1 E93 Nature loving Katha Kumari Rathi is a bit reserved but full of life! And our hero is the charismatic chef UV. What happens when their lives intertwine?
S1 E93 Noyontara, gifted to see spirits, embarks on a chilling journey. Marrying into the Sengupta family, she unravels a chilling tapestry of dark family secrets.
S1 E93 Indu is thrust into the spotlight after she locks horns with a Bollywood star Ritesh. Chaos ensues when fate forces the duo into a marriage of convenience.

S1 E55 On seeing Anjali's saree on fire, Astha douses her with water, but gets insuted by her and Jaya. Later, Shlok orders Jaya to leave the house. Meanwhile, Astha makes pooran poli for the family, but Sojal tampers with the dish.

S1 E56 Shlok informs Astha that the pooran poli is extremely sweet but appreciates her effort nonetheless. He also stops Anjali from commenting on the food. Later, Anjali scolds Astha for wearing a lehenga-choli.

S1 E96 Indu is thrust into the spotlight after she locks horns with a Bollywood star Ritesh. Chaos ensues when fate forces the duo into a marriage of convenience.

S1 E61 Anjali is enraged to see Astha in Shlok's room. Astha apologises but Shlok shouts back in Astha's defence. Anjali also warns Astha to stay away from her personal matters and informs Niranjan of what is happening.

S1 E62 Shlok requests Astha to present the award to him for helping an NGO. Astha apologises for insulting him and presents the award. A livid Anjali rebukes Astha. Later, Astha is welcomed by her parents.

S2 E1 The Missing
Native women are disappearing from Alaska in plain sight, and it takes an unexpected discovery to alert police to a serial killer.

S2 E1 The Missing
Native women are disappearing from Alaska in plain sight, and it takes an unexpected discovery to alert police to a serial killer.

S2 E2 Manhunt
After police expose a killer, they must act fast to catch him, but he has more shocking revelations for them and other victims' identities to reveal.

S2 E3 No Longer Silent
At trial, justice reveals new horrors and a woman interviews the killer. One family take matters into their own hands in the fight for the truth.

S2 E3 The Town With Tourettes
Unexplained tics in teen girls draw reporters and experts, fuelling hysteria. Under pressure, the girls face judgment without any answers.

S9 E5 The Girl On The Bike
In 1972, a young woman's life is violently cut short, and investigators hunt for a bogeyman across the forests and farms of the Pacific Northwest.

S3 E13 Prescription For Murder
Wisconsin police are shocked to find an elderly couple brutally murdered in their home. When family start receiving death threats, will murder strike again?

S4 E1 Football Fatale
Washington Redskins star Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home. And when it comes to the rich and famous, it seems like everybody has a motive.

S1 E3 Mysterious Canister
A man gets aggressive when his bags are being checked. Plus, Alex discovers a canister and suspects that it might contain drugs.

S5 E6 Dangerous Games
14-year old Breck has a passion for computers and gaming. But when he meets a successful online entrepreneur, passion turns to obsession and becomes deadly.

S1 E2 Shedding Clothes
Customs check for drugs at a party cruise with hundreds of young people. Plus, an angry woman sheds her clothes at Arlanda airport.

S1 E3 Mysterious Canister
A man gets aggressive when his bags are being checked. Plus, Alex discovers a canister and suspects that it might contain drugs.

S3 E8 Unbrotherly Behavior
After a long battle with cancer, David Weedman is found dead in his home with a gunshot wound. Investigators soon turn their focus to David's best friends.

S3 E9 Caught In The Act
In Osakis, Minnesota, a baseball-loving wife and mother is found unconscious at home. Investigators turn to family, friends and locals to piece together what happened.

S2 E8 Follow The Money
In 2021, a strange visitor leads police to a Norman, Oklahoma, basement, where they unwrap the gruesome contents of a suspicious box.

programmes.t: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programmes.d:
S1 E1 Hazard Lights
The abduction and murder of a young schoolteacher shocks a New England town. Veteran investigator Robert Cushing is appalled by the depravity of the killer's plan.

S5 E8 Control Alt Delete
US army veteran Maribel Ramos goes missing after arranging a date online. Detectives discover a twisted tale of unrequired love, jealousy and rage.

S2 E2 Nothing To Hide
21-year-old Nicole Hutchings doesn't return home from a Halloween party. Over time, secrets begin to emerge and lead investigators to the least likely of suspects.

S2 E3 That's My Brother
Morris Davis and Suzette Pritchard are the victims of brutal overkill. The police can't find a suspect until a random tip breaks the case wide open.

S1 E4 Dusty Finds A Gun
A bag has been left behind at Arlanda airport - it smells of death and contains something that looks like bones. Plus, Dusty the dog finds a gun.

S4 E9 One Way Ticket Out
When a lifelong Long Islander, Donna Bocklet, announces she's moving to Florida, it sends a shock wave through her friends and family that ends in her murder.

S1 E2 Dead Lift
There are lots of dirty secrets buried in the desert. When Nevada police dig up the most devious of all, they discover a tale of unbreakable oaths and unhinged bloodlust.

S1 E1 Teenage Dreams
As a teenager, Nick Carter becomes famous with boy band The Backstreet Boys. Years later, former popstar Melissa Schuman alleges that Carter sexually assaulted her.

S1 E2 Into The Darkness
Melissa Schuman deals with Nick's fans after her assault allegations, and another victim comes forward. But the most shocking ally is Nick's brother, Aaron Carter.

S4 E8 Family Matters
When a teen boy falls in love with a single teen mum, his very strict parents send him abroad. But, he'll stop at nothing to be reunited with the girl he loves.

S4 E10 Bound By Honor
A young woman has to hide her relationship from her orthodox father and protective brother. But, their heavenly relationship quickly becomes a hellish nightmare.

S1 E2 Thrill Kill
A couple on a murderous crime spree leaves a bloody trail, from Speedway, Indiana, to Texas. Police race to catch them before they strike again.

S1 E3 Star Crossed Killers
Growing family tensions take a brutal turn in Lafayette, Colorado, after a single mum vanishes. An anonymous tip tells police where to find her body.

S2 E11 Last Call
A man calls 911 after seeing his friend killed. With a surprisingly long list of suspects, investigators must sort through layers of lies, jealousy, and mistrust.

S10 E13 I Am Not My Father
A young man knew his father was a monster and a killer, but to this day, he doesn't know the scope of his father's horrendous crimes.

S2 E6 The Torment
Janece Cook moved in with her parents after struggling with her mental health. But, when Janece's behaviour is linked to her dad's suicide, her sister seeks revenge.
