A stunning period drama that scooped five Academy Awards. Russell Crowe stars as a Roman general seeking revenge after being brutally betrayed by an emperor's corrupt son.
A stunning period drama that scooped five Academy Awards. Russell Crowe stars as a Roman general seeking revenge after being brutally betrayed by an emperor's corrupt son.
Almost four decades after he drew first blood, Sylvester Stallone is back as John Rambo. He must face his past and unearth his ruthless skills to exact revenge for a final mission.
An estranged father and son are forced to work together to fight off a group of criminals hellbent on revenge in this action starring Bruce Willis as a retired CIA agent.
Bruce Willis and Megan Fox face a deadly criminal in this action thriller. An FBI agent and Florida State officer team up to investigate a string of unsolved murder cases.
This Oscar-nominated drama from the director of Troy sees an ambitious fisherman (George Clooney) and his crew caught in an unusually intense storm that puts them in mortal danger.
A delightful animated adventure. A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father - only to discover that he's Bigfoot.
Elijah Wood and the late Robin Williams star in this touching sequel. A young penguin struggles to find himself but faces his fears when his colony is threatened.
Paddington's delightful adventures continue in this BAFTA-nominated sequel. After a beloved book is stolen, Paddington and the Browns must find the crafty thief behind the crime.
Alec Baldwin lends his voice talent to this off-beat animation. A 7-year-old boy's life is turned upside down at the arrival of a suit-wearing, briefcase-carrying baby.
Charlie Hunnam and Idris Elba fight to cancel the apocalypse in this in this blockbuster. Giant robots fight to defend humanity from giant monsters trying to destroy Earth.

programmes.t: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programmes.d: Mike Myers returns as the groovy spy in this sequel to the cult classic. Dr Evil is back with a new time machine that allows him to travel back in time to steal Austin Powers' mojo.
An ensemble cast brings the legendary comic book league to life in this superhero movie. When Earth is attacked by an alien force, Batman recruits the help of the planet's mightiest heroes.
Paul Walker and Tyrese Gibson join forces to bring a Miami drug lord to justice in the first sequel to the Hollywood thrill ride. Expect hot cars and plenty of action.
Director Zack Snyder and Gerard Butler create an explicit visual spectacle based on an iconic graphic novel. A Spartan king leads 300 men to battle the marauding Persian Empire.
An all-female ensemble slays this cult crime franchise. Newly released from prison, Debbie Ocean gathers a skilled crew to perform a daring heist at the iconic Met Gala.
An all-female ensemble slays this cult crime franchise. Newly released from prison, Debbie Ocean gathers a skilled crew to perform a daring heist at the iconic Met Gala.
Joaquin Phoenix gives a brilliant performance, earning him an Oscar. Shunned by society, a socially inept clown finds solace in being Gotham City's most wanted man.
Ben Affleck stars in this tense crime drama from the director of Ronin. A small-time crook takes on the identity of a criminal and soon becomes overwhelmed by his stolen life.
Oscar-winner Matthew McConaughey leads an all-star cast in this action-filled romcom. The search for a lost treasure rekindles a married couple's love for each other.
The crazy creatures return for this sequel. When media mogul gets a creature it accidentally spawns dozens of mischievous gremlins that take of the whole building.
'Harry Potter And The Philosopher's Stone'. JK Rowling's popular tale about a young boy who discovers his destiny lies in a school for wizards where anything can, and does, happen.
In a movie that became an instant comedy classic, Ben Stiller and Owen Wilson play two rivals facing off in this crazy look at male modelling and the world of high fashion.
Classic animated adventure for everyone. A cranky green ogre with a heart of gold leaves his swamp for the first time, and learns that the outside world isn't as bad as it seems.
When the murderous Lord Shen threatens China with a terrifying new weapon, Po must face a truth he never expected and defeat Shen for the good of Kung Fu.
An all-star cast drives this fantastic animated Lego adventure. When the teenage son of a warlord is shunned by everyone, he and his fellow ninjas set out to regain his honour.
The four mutant brothers return for a thrilling sequel. Once again, they face Shredder, but this time, he has interdimensional help.
Christopher Nolan directs and Christian Bale stars in this critically acclaimed superhero reboot that sees Batman take on a crime-ridden Gotham City.
The car chases get faster and the action gets more furious when Vin Diesel, Paul Walker and the crew return for more high-octane viewing. The crew take on a team of mercenaries.
The car chases get faster and the action gets more furious when Vin Diesel, Paul Walker and the crew return for more high-octane viewing. The crew take on a team of mercenaries.
Not many films rival the visual spectacle of Christopher Nolan's sci-fi epic. Leonardo DiCaprio and a stellar cast enter people's dreams to steal corporate secrets.
Anna Faris stars in this crazy horror spoof. A group of dumb teenagers accidentally killed a man and get rid of the body. A year later they are stalked by a clumsy serial killer.
Action star Bruce Willis drives this home invasion thriller. Two robbers hold a disgraced doctor and his family hostage so that they can get treatment after a robbery gone wrong.
Tom Hanks won a Best Actor Golden Globe for his powerful performance as a man tested mentally, physically and emotionally after he's stranded on a remote island.

programmes.t: Harry Potter And The Chamber Of...
programmes.d: A darker, edgier sequel that sees Harry Potter (Daniel Radcliffe) and his friends work together to uncover the location of a dark presence.
Ben Stiller and Owen Wilson return for this sequel to their 2001 smash hit. The two models are trying to make a comeback but instead are sucked into a sinister conspiracy.
A fun animated adventure for the whole family. Two fun-loving crooks find the mythical city of gold populated by an ancient group of people who start treating them like Gods.
Everyone's favourite ogre returns for another adventure. Newlyweds Fiona and Shrek are invited to visit Fiona's parents in the kingdom of Far Far Away.
Chris Pratt and an all-star cast return for this sequel. This time Emmet and the gang find themselves going on a space adventure when they are invaded by the Lego Duplo.
Ryan Reynolds stars in this interstellar superhero film. After finding an alien ring, a pilot gains incredible powers and is inducted into an intergalactic police force.
Christian Bale and the late Heath Ledger face off in the second instalment of Christopher Nolan's Batman trilogy. Batman must stop The Joker from destroying Gotham City.
Fast & Furious 7.
This high octane crime adventure is the last Fast & Furious for the late Paul Walker. A deadly criminal seeks vengeance for his brother, against Toretto and his family.
Dwayne Johnson and Karl Urban star in this action horror based on a video game classic. Space marines are sent to investigate a research station but find unspeakable horrors.
MATWETWE (WIZARD) is a coming-of-age adventure following Lefa and Papi, best friends and recent high school graduates. The boys try to score a huge deal and save their lives.
Mel Gibson stars in this book-inspired crime mystery. A disgraced ex-cop comes out of retirement to investigate a murder in which an actor is accused of killing his wife.
Oscar-winning actor Morgan Freeman and Owen Wilson make mischief in this comedy about a con artist who gets in over his head. Lies and double deals make this an entertaining watch.
This Oscar-nominated drama from the director of Troy sees an ambitious fisherman (George Clooney) and his crew caught in an unusually intense storm that puts them in mortal danger.

S1 E2 Inverses and Functions
A Grade 12 Tenfold show live from Randburg studio brings you Mathematics.

S1 E1 Probability & Statistics
This new show is aligned to the British curriculum and is aimed at teachers, learners and parents following this curriculum.

S1 E6 Energy and Chemical Change. The Rate and Extent of Chemical Reactions
In this episode, we will focus on. Energy and chemical change.

S1 E5 Physical and Chemical Properties of Organic Compounds and Polymerization
Focus on factors affecting physical properties of organic molecules, chemical reactions of organic compounds and types of polymerisation.

S1 E1 Momentum and Impulse
In this episode, we will focus on. momentum, Newton's second law, impulse and momentum calculations, applications of impulse, law of conservation and linear momentum, elastic and inelastic calculations.

S1 E2 Vertical Projectile Motion in 1D
In this episode, we will focus on. The concept of free fall and the vertical motion of objects.

S1 E3 Organic Chemistry. Chemistry of Carbon Compounds
In this episode, we will focus on organic molecules and the chemistry of hydrocarbons.

S1 E4 Hydrocarbon Derivatives and Esterification
In this episode, we will focus on. Functional groups, homologous series and esterification.
S1 E7 A collection of locally produced animation in the Afrikaans Language aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.
S1 E7 A collection of locally produced animation aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.
S1 E7 A collection of locally produced animation in the IsiXhosa Language aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.

S1 E29 3D Objects
In this episode, we speak about 3D geometric objects. 3D objects can be difficult to teach and we talk about how these ideas may be taugh effectively to learners in Grade 8 and 9.

S1 E22 Repeated Addition, Creating Number Patterns, Facts and Bonds, Measurement
In this episode our teacher takes us through a Grade 2 lesson on repeated addition, creating number patterns, facts and bonds, and measurement.

S2 E7 News - My big news
We will look at writing news.

S2 E7 Letter-sound relationships
We look at Letter-sound relationships.

S2 E7 Table of contents
We learn what a table of contents is.

S1 E17 IsiXhosa
Incremental Introduction of African Languages (IIAL) aims to offer children the chance to learn the African Languages of IsiXhosa and IsiZulu, in a fun and interactive way.

S2 E7 Adverbs of degree
We learn about adverbs of degree.

S2 E7 Do I look the way I sound?
We look at how words in word families look and sound.

S2 E7 Let us make it personal
We learn about personal pronouns.

S2 E2 Multiplication of common fractions
We learn about Simple multiplication. No simplifying.

S1 E2 Physical properties of matter: Strength
We take a look at physical properties of matter, mainly strength.
S1 E7 A collection of locally produced animation aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.

S1 E8 Number Patterns
In this lesson we learn about patterns in nature, this is physical or diagram form.

S1 E8 Numeric and Geometric Number Patterns
In this lesson we learn to investigate and extend patterns.

S2 E13 Electrostatics
In this episode, we will focus on electrostatics.

S3 E21 Electostatics and Electric fields
In this episode, we will focus on superposition in 2D for forces, electric field lines, electric field calculations and superposition of electric fields.

S1 E25 Momentum and Impulse
In this series of Tenfold shows we prepare you for our live shows in order for you to get the most out of them.

S1 E2 Momentum and Impulse
In this Grade 12 show our teacher answers questions related to vertical projectile motion.

S1 E7 Momentum & Newton's Laws
In this Q&A live show repeat we answer learners' questions on momentum and Newton's law.

Tenfold Live Physical Sciences.

S1 E2 Probability & Statistics
This new show is aligned to the British curriculum and aimed at teachers, learners and parents following this curriculum.

S1 E1 DNA. The Code of Life
The topic of this episode, is DNA. The code of life.

S1 E2 RNA and Protein Synthesis
In this episode, we will examine the role RNA plays in the manufacture or synthesis of proteins.

S1 E3 Meiosis
In this episode, we will learn about meiosis.

S1 E4 Reproductive Strategies
In this episode, we will examine what we mean by reproductive strategies, what these are and why they are important.

S1 E5 Human Reproduction
In this episode, we will look very briefly at a wide range of topics, from the structure of the reproductive systems in males and females, to puberty and gametogenesis.

S1 E6 Hormonal Control of Reproduction
In this episode, we learn about the menstrual cycle and hormonal control of reproduction.
